notes: Two-leg WTI/AUDCAD return-spread reversion basket from the approved EIA-RBA-BOC-XTI-AUDCAD-2026 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute XTI return plus beta-weighted AUDCAD return. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not the standalone legs.
